headline: BMP March 2026: 125 girls and 38 women raped; 36 gang-rape victims in March alone
notes: BMP March 2026 press conference data. 442 total violence cases in March. 125 girls + 38 women raped. 36 gang-rape victims. Monthly total not disaggregated from national PHQ data.

headline: Barishal Trish Godown gang rape verdict: four death sentences for November 2016 assault
notes: Four men convicted for November 2016 gang rape. ~3,380 days from assault to verdict. Illustrates normal WCRPA timeline. Judge M Rakibul Islam. Khokon Khan absconding at time of verdict.

headline: Barishal court orders arrest of rape complainant and five others under Section 17 after case found unsubstantiated
notes: Second documented Section 17 counter-prosecution of a rape survivor. Three teachers among those charged. Under 2025 Ordinance expansion, Section 17 now includes 'loss of dignity or reputation'.

headline: Supreme Court Secretariat: total national cases pending = 4,516,603 as of January 10, 2026
notes: SC Secretariat officially launched December 11, 2025. First official national pending case count: 4,516,603 total cases across all courts.

headline: UNICEF/BBS MICS 2025: 76% lifetime IPV nationally; Dhaka division 72.9%; Barishal highest at 81.5%
notes: Updated VAW Survey 2025. 27,476 women interviewed. 62-64% told no one about assault. Divisional breakdown confirms geography of crisis maps onto geography of enforcement failures.

headline: DNA lab: 1,204 of 1,304 samples (92%) pending as of September 2025 — 789 cases fully stalled
notes: NFDPL processing backlog confirmed. 92% of submitted DNA samples unprocessed. 789 cases completely stalled nationwide due to DNA backlog. Only 2 DNA profiling machines for 170M people.

headline: Magura case (MG-2025-001): High Court admits Hitu Sheikh appeal, stays BDT 100,000 fine
notes: HC bench: Justice Mostafizur Rahman + Justice Sagir Hossain. Fine stayed pending review. Death sentence cannot proceed until appeal decided. Case triggered 2025 WCRPA Amendment Ordinance.

headline: Magura verdict: Hitu Sheikh sentenced to death. 71 days from assault to verdict vs WCRPA average 2,349 days
notes: Eight-year-old Achia rape-murder case. 71 days from assault to verdict. Three co-accused acquitted for insufficient evidence. Death reference sent to High Court May 21.
